scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaskar! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Deepak?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Deepak.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Thanks for showing interest in PW courses. Main samaj sakti hun you're looking for some guidance with your studies. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in class 11.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Class 11 is the right time to start serious preparation. Are you targeting JEE or NEET, ya koi aur exam?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Main... but I'm just exploring options right now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, exploring is good! JEE Main ke liye you have around 21 months, which is excellent timing. Have you started any preparation already or looking to begin?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I've started a bit... but not very structured.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's completely normal! Most students face this. At PW, we have structured courses specifically for JEE 2027. Our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch is very comprehensive with live classes, doubt solving, and regular tests. Have you heard about our courses before?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I've seen some videos on YouTube... but I don't know much about paid courses.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, our YouTube content is great for basics! But paid courses offer much more - live interactive classes, personal mentorship, regular assessments, and structured study plans. The JEE Lakshya 2027 is our premium batch at ₹35,999, and we also have JEE Arjuna 2027 at ₹19,999. What's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I... I need to check with my parents about budget. What's the difference between these courses?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Parent approval is important. Lakshya has more live classes per week, additional doubt sessions, and personal mentorship. Arjuna covers all syllabus but with fewer live sessions. Both have same quality teaching. Would you like me to explain the EMI options too? It makes it very affordable.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: EMI... how does that work?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Through PW Pay, you can get 0% EMI! For Lakshya, it's just ₹3,499 per month, and for Arjuna, it's ₹1,999 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Makes it very manageable, right?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds... okay I guess. But I'm not ready to decide anything today.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely no pressure, Deepak! Main samajh sakti hun. Would you be the one making this decision, or do you need to discuss with your parents first?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I definitely need to talk to my parents first. They handle all these decisions.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! That's very responsible of you. Can I call you back tomorrow evening after you've had a chance to discuss with them? I can also send you detailed course information on WhatsApp if you'd like.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Um... maybe call after 2-3 days? I need some time to think and discuss properly.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! No problem at all. I'll call you after 3 days. Meanwhile, main aapko course details WhatsApp kar deti hun. And Deepak, if you have any questions before that, feel free to call me anytime, okay?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, that works. Thanks.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You're welcome! Best of luck with your preparation, and I'll speak to you soon. Take care!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you, bye.
